description: Examined published literature and found the highest full Kronecker coefficient tables computed are up to S_19 (see K. Bürgisser & M. Christandl et al, cited below). This computation is the first complete table for S_20 and S_30.
action_taken: Examined published literature and found the highest full Kronecker coefficient tables computed are up to S_19 (see K. Bürgisser & M. Christandl et al, cited below). This computation is the first complete table for S_20 and S_30.
